steps.title: Identify the time gap
steps.content: The passage contrasts being “overlooked for decades” with the shift to “in 2017, lawmakers declared recognition.” The transition must show the progression from long neglect to eventual honor.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content: ”Then” indicates sequence in time—after decades of being overlooked, then (in 2017) lawmakers recognized them. This connects the two moments naturally. The others don't work: Lastly fits enumeration, Similarly equates opposites, and For example reverses the logic. That matches choice B — B is correct.
